commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Altars. Hebrew, "high places, and the Chamanim "or temples of the sun, Leviticus xxvi. 30. (Calmet)
Protestants, "images. "(Haydock)
Asa was encouraged to perfect the work which he had begun, by the exhortation of Azarias, chap. xv. 8. (Calmet)
